About
SEO and Digital Marketing that generates traffic, leads, and sales

I am an SEO and Digital Marketing Specialist based in Islamabad with 3+ years of hands-on experience working with 25+ clients across multiple industries. I help businesses grow through the full digital marketing mix: SEO, paid social, paid search, content strategy, local visibility, and conversion-focused campaigns that generate real revenue, not just traffic numbers.

On the SEO side, I handle everything from technical audits and crawl fixes to content strategy and link building. On the paid media side, I run Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns that have generated 121 purchases in a single month, 173 leads at $1.93 per conversation, and 440 WhatsApp enquiries in 7 days. Before starting any engagement, I run keyword gap analysis in Ahrefs, crawl audits in Screaming Frog, and pull GSC and GA4 data to identify exactly what needs to be fixed and what should be prioritised first. Every client receives clear monthly reporting in plain language so they always know what improved, why it improved, and what comes next.

Case Studies
Real projects. Real data. Real results.
SEO · Long-Term Growth · Ongoing
42.8K clicks and 5.63M impressions built over 16 months of sustained SEO
Took on a website with minimal organic presence and built it into a high-visibility search asset over 16 months. The strategy combined regular technical SEO maintenance, a structured content publishing cadence, schema markup, and GMB optimisation. After the initial ramp-up period, the site reached 42.8K total organic clicks and 5.63M impressions with an average position of 10.6. The 3-month snapshot shows 11.7K clicks and 1.6M impressions at an average position of 8.6, confirming the site is now consistently ranking in the top 10 for its target keywords. This engagement is ongoing.
42.8K Clicks · 5.63M Impressions (16 months) 11.7K Clicks · 1.6M Impressions (3 months) Avg. Position 8.6 Ongoing Engagement
Google Search Console: 16-month view showing 42.8K organic clicks and 5.63M impressions with average position 10.6
Google Search Console: 3-month view of the same site showing 11.7K clicks, 1.6M impressions, average position 8.6
SEO · 3-Month Engagement · Completed
437% click surge and position improved from 15.2 to 10.5 in a focused 3-month engagement
A client with stagnant rankings brought me in for a focused 3-month SEO push. I ran a competitive keyword gap analysis, refreshed all key pages for E-E-A-T signals, resolved Core Web Vitals issues, and built a targeted internal linking structure. By the end of the engagement, organic clicks had grown from 776 to 4,170 and impressions jumped from 36.3K to 125K. Average position improved from 15.2 to 10.5, pushing the site firmly into the top half of page one. The site continued to grow after the engagement ended, confirming the work was built on solid foundations.
Clicks: 776 to 4,170 (+437%) Position: 15.2 to 10.5 Impressions: 36.3K to 125K 3-Month Engagement
Google Search Console: Clicks grew from 776 to 4,170 and impressions from 36.3K to 125K in a 3-month engagement
SEO · Separate Client · High CTR
8.5K web clicks at 16.4% CTR, significantly above industry average
Managed SEO for a separate client where the focus was not just on rankings but on click-through rate optimisation. By rewriting title tags and meta descriptions to be intent-aligned and action-driven, and by targeting featured snippet positions, the site achieved an exceptional 16.4% average CTR on web search, far above the typical 2 to 5% industry benchmark. The account generated 8.5K web clicks from 51.8K impressions with an average position of 11, demonstrating that visibility paired with strong messaging converts far more effectively than rankings alone.
CTR: 16.4% (Industry avg. is 2 to 5%) 8.5K Clicks from 51.8K Impressions Avg. Position 11
Google Search Console: 8.5K web clicks at 16.4% average CTR, significantly above industry benchmarks
SEO · Previous Project · Growth Verified
2.84M impressions over 16 months with sharp acceleration in final 3 months
An earlier long-term SEO engagement that accumulated 26.2K total clicks and 2.84M impressions over 16 months. The standout result was a sharp growth spike in the final 3-month window, driven by a targeted content sprint and schema markup implementation. This project demonstrates the compounding nature of consistent SEO work and the impact of well-timed optimisation pushes.
26.2K Clicks · 2.84M Impressions Visible 3-Month Acceleration 16-Month Engagement
Google Search Console: 16-month performance with 26.2K clicks and 2.84M impressions, sharp growth spike visible in final 3 months
Meta Ads · E-commerce · Purchases
121 website purchases at $15.40 per purchase in one month via Meta Ads
Managed a Meta Ads campaign for an e-commerce client with the goal of driving direct website purchases. Over a single month in October, the campaign generated 121 confirmed website purchases at an average cost per purchase of $15.40, with a total ad spend of $1,863.43. The campaign maintained consistent daily purchase volume throughout the month, demonstrating stable audience targeting and creative performance without significant drop-off.
121 Website Purchases in 1 Month $15.40 Cost Per Purchase $1,863.43 Total Spend Meta Ads · E-commerce
Meta Ads Manager: 121 website purchases at $15.40 cost per purchase over one month with $1,863.43 total spend
Meta Ads · Lead Generation · Messaging
173 messaging conversations started at $1.93 per conversation in one month
Ran a Meta Ads messaging campaign for a client focused on generating direct customer conversations. Over one month in January, the campaign delivered 173 messaging conversations at an average cost of $1.93 per conversation, with a total spend of $334.68. At under $2 per qualified conversation, this campaign delivered an exceptionally efficient cost per lead for the client.
173 Conversations in 1 Month $1.93 Cost Per Conversation $334.68 Total Spend Meta Ads · Messaging Campaign
Meta Ads Manager: 173 messaging conversations at $1.93 cost per conversation over one month with $334.68 total spend
Meta Ads · Lead Generation
440 messaging conversations generated in just 7 days at Rs.9.20 per result
Designed and launched an Instagram Lookalike Audience engagement campaign for a local business. Within 7 days, the campaign generated 440 messaging conversations at an average cost per result of Rs.9.20, reaching 10,184 unique users with 12,967 impressions on a daily budget of Rs.1,000. This is a highly efficient spend-to-lead ratio that directly translated into sales conversations for the client.
440 Conversations in 7 Days Rs.9.20 Cost Per Result 10,184 Unique Users Reached Rs.1,000 Daily Budget
Meta Ads Manager: 440 messaging conversations at Rs.9.20 CPR achieved within 7 days on a Rs.1,000 daily budget
PPC · E-commerce
CPC reduced 25% and ROAS improved 40% through Google Ads restructuring
Audited and rebuilt an underperforming Google Ads account for an e-commerce client. Restructured campaigns, refined audience targeting, tightened negative keyword lists, and A/B tested ad creatives. Simultaneously optimised product pages and blog content for organic search. Result: 25% lower CPC, 40% better ROAS, and a measurable lift in organic conversions running alongside paid performance.
CPC Reduced by 25% ROAS Improved by 40% Google Ads Restructure + SEO
Local SEO · Lead Generation
15+ keywords ranked on Page 1 in 3 months with 70% increase in qualified leads
A service-based business needed stronger local visibility to drive inbound leads. Identified high-intent local keywords, built geo-targeted landing pages, fully optimised the Google Business Profile, and executed a structured link-building campaign. Within 3 months, 15+ target keywords reached Page 1, resulting in a 70% uplift in qualified inbound leads from organic search.
15+ Page 1 Keywords in 3 Months Qualified Leads Up 70% Local SEO + GMB Optimisation

What I deliver for clients and employers
Technical SEO
Crawl audits, indexing fixes, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, site architecture optimisation
On-Page SEO
Content optimisation, E-E-A-T signals, meta strategy, CTR-focused title and description writing
Local SEO and GMB
Google Business Profile optimisation, local citations, map pack rankings, geo-targeted landing pages
Link Building
White-hat outreach, digital PR, authority backlink acquisition and toxic link removal
Content Strategy
Topical authority mapping, keyword clustering, content calendar planning, blog optimisation
GA4 and GSC Analytics
Performance tracking, monthly reporting, conversion analysis, traffic and ranking insights
E-commerce SEO
Product page optimisation, category SEO, structured data, feed and conversion optimisation
PPC and Paid Ads
Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign builds, audience targeting, ROAS optimisation, A/B testing
